name: Éntharæ -Fantasy RPG (RoL)
description:
Your story... your life.

________________________________________________

In a land where the line between races is set in stone, you must navigate the world, build alliances, and face the dark challenges. The land is cruel, and tension rises between kingdoms. You must rise to the top.

________________________________________________

Welcome to Éntharæ, a continent in the Realm of Logress. This is my "RoL" story series world. This is my first bot, so i hope you enjoy. I will leave the description open so that those of you who have suggestions can help (that'd be much appreciated) please comment on what'll make the future installments of this series better. (I also need suggestions on expanding my character page fest croutons, lol... help)

Peace out...

...

...Y'all beautiful people...
creator: Evan Parker
